creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
While preparing for Boost upgrade this port failed to build. Can you help to avoid marking it as BROKEN?

$ fetch -qo- 'https://reviews.freebsd.org/D19303?download=true' |
  patch -Efsp0 -d /usr/ports
$ make all deinstall install clean -C/usr/ports/devel/boost-jam
$ make all deinstall install clean -C/usr/ports/devel/boost-libs
$ make -C/usr/ports/graphics/luxrender14
[...]
.../work/luxrender-lux-dfd211d6faa0/core/asyncstream.cpp:68:9: error: no member named 'get_io_service' in 'boost::asio::basic_stream_socket<boost::asio::ip::tcp, boost::asio::executor>'
        socket.get_io_service().reset();
        ~~~~~~ ^
.../work/luxrender-lux-dfd211d6faa0/core/asyncstream.cpp:70:43: error: no member named 'get_io_service' in 'boost::asio::basic_stream_socket<boost::asio::ip::tcp, boost::asio::executor>'
        boost::asio::deadline_timer timer(socket.get_io_service());
                                          ~~~~~~ ^
.../work/luxrender-lux-dfd211d6faa0/core/asyncstream.cpp:94:17: error: no member named 'get_io_service' in 'boost::asio::basic_stream_socket<boost::asio::ip::tcp, boost::asio::executor>'
        while ( socket.get_io_service().run_one() ) {
                ~~~~~~ ^
.../work/luxrender-lux-dfd211d6faa0/core/asyncstream.cpp:128:9: error: no member named 'get_io_service' in 'boost::asio::basic_stream_socket<boost::asio::ip::tcp, boost::asio::executor>'
        socket.get_io_service().reset();
        ~~~~~~ ^
.../work/luxrender-lux-dfd211d6faa0/core/asyncstream.cpp:130:43: error: no member named 'get_io_service' in 'boost::asio::basic_stream_socket<boost::asio::ip::tcp, boost::asio::executor>'
        boost::asio::deadline_timer timer(socket.get_io_service());
                                          ~~~~~~ ^
.../work/luxrender-lux-dfd211d6faa0/core/asyncstream.cpp:155:17: error: no member named 'get_io_service' in 'boost::asio::basic_stream_socket<boost::asio::ip::tcp, boost::asio::executor>'
        while ( socket.get_io_service().run_one() ) {
                ~~~~~~ ^
6 errors generated.
